SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAN, CONNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERCEDES BENZ OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
